name: Secret Scan
description: Scan a directory tree for committed secrets using regex patterns + Shannon entropy. Zero network, zero LLM, zero callbacks — pure local pattern matching.
author: crunchybananas

tools.name: scan
tools.description: Walk a directory tree and flag likely committed secrets — API keys, tokens, private keys, AWS credentials, JWTs — using regex + Shannon entropy. Returns findings with redacted previews and confidence scores.

includeGitignored.description: If false (default), respect a .gitignore at the path root and skip ignored files.

minEntropy.description: Shannon entropy threshold for high-entropy random-string detection. Lower = more findings + more noise.

patterns.description: Optional extra regex patterns to apply on top of the built-in set. Each is evaluated per-line.
